skills.description: A skill that analyzes health goal data, identifies patterns and progress, evaluates goal achievement, and provides personalized goal management advice.
trigger_conditions: User sets a new health goal
User wants to track progress towards a specific goal
User needs help identifying patterns in their behavior
User seeks personalized advice for managing goals
anti_triggers: User is dealing with eating disorders or obsessive behaviors

skills.description: A tool to analyze health data trends and patterns over a period of time, identifying changes, correlations, and providing data-driven insights into health.
trigger_conditions: When the user asks about their health changes over time
When the user wants an analysis of their health trends
When the user asks what has changed with their body condition
When the user asks for a summary of their health status
anti_triggers: When the user asks for a medical diagnosis
